channel.title: Danfoss — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Danfoss (danfoss).

item.title: CVE-2025-41452 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Post auth nginx configuration injection in Danfoss AK-SM8xxA Series
item.description: Post-authenticated external control of system web interface configuration setting vulnerability in Danfoss AK-SM8xxA Series prior to 4.3.1, which could allow for a denial of service attack induced by improper handling of exceptional conditions

item.title: CVE-2025-41451 · 8.7 HIGH — Post-Authentication OS Command Injection RCE in Danfoss AK-SM8xxA Series
item.description: Improper neutralization of alarm-to-mail configuration fields used in an OS shell Command ('Command Injection') in Danfoss AK-SM8xxA Series prior to version 4.3.1, leading to a potential post-authenticated remote code execution on an attacked system.

item.title: CVE-2025-41450 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Authentication bypass with privileged access in Danfoss AK-SM 8xxA Series prior to version 4.2
item.description: Improper Authentication vulnerability in Danfoss AKSM8xxA Series.This issue affects Danfoss AK-SM 8xxA Series prior to version 4.2
